title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
summary: Google Cloud announced an updated agent platform featuring unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with Agent Builder, no-code/low-code Agent Designer, and an Agent Registry for reusable components. The platform includes enterprise governance, management capabilities, time-travel debugging, integrated evaluation, simulation, and expanded Agent Development Kit with agent-to-agent communication and secure code execution.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through an updated agent platform built around a unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. The lineup includes Agent Builder, a no-code/low-code Agent Designer, and an Agent Registry for reusable components, plus enterprise governance and management features. For debugging and quality, it adds time-travel debugging, integrated evaluation, and simulation. The Agent Development Kit expands with agent-to-agent communication and secure code execution.
